eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Standard supply chain process with no identified high-risk characteristics

gaps: Lack of explicit risk management process for AI-driven design chain strategy
Insufficient documentation on human oversight and review of AI-generated design chain objectives
Unclear criteria for escalation rules and compliance flags
recommendations: Implement a risk management process to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks associated with AI-driven design chain strategy
Establish a clear documentation process for human oversight and review of AI-generated design chain objectives
Define and document clear criteria for escalation rules and compliance flags, including procedures for addressing changes in business objectives or customer requirements

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained
